info.title: HTL Kahoot API
info.description: API documentation for the HTL Kahoot application

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of questions. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

post.description: Creates a new question and its first version atomically. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

title.example: What is the capital of France?

get.description: Returns a question with its current version and answer options. Published questions are visible to all authenticated users; unpublished ones require ownership or admin role.

put.description: Creates a new version of the question, preserving all previous versions. Updates current_version_id to the new version.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a question. The owner or admin/superadmin can delete.

post.description: Restores a previously soft-deleted question. Admin and superadmin only.

get.description: Returns all versions of a question ordered by version number. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

patch.description: Toggles the is_published flag of a question. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of question pools. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

post.description: Creates a new question pool. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

get.description: Returns a question pool with its question count. Shared pools are visible to all authenticated users.

put.description: Updates pool name, description or shared flag. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

delete.description: Deletes a question pool. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

post.description: Attaches one or more questions to the pool. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

delete.summary: Remove a question from a pool
delete.description: Detaches a question from the pool. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of quizzes. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

post.description: Creates a new quiz. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

get.description: Returns a quiz with its questions and pool. Published quizzes are visible to all authenticated users.

put.description: Updates quiz settings. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a quiz. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

post.description: Restores a previously soft-deleted quiz. Admin and superadmin only.

patch.description: Toggles the is_published flag of a quiz. Owner or admin/superadmin only.

post.summary: Add a question to a quiz
post.description: Adds a specific question version to the quiz with sort order and optional overrides.

put.description: Updates sort order, point/time overrides, or weight for a question in the quiz.

delete.summary: Remove a question from a quiz
delete.description: Removes a question entry from the quiz.

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of users. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter by role name (student, teacher, admin, superadmin)

parameters.name: class_prefix
parameters.description: Filter classes starting with this prefix (e.g. "3" matches 3a, 3b)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search in email, username, display_name

post.description: Creates a new user and assigns a role. Admin and superadmin only.

password.description: Required when auth_provider is local. Must contain uppercase, lowercase and a number.

get.description: Returns distinct class names with the number of students in each. Accessible by teachers, admins and superadmins.
Returns aggregated user counts. Admin and superadmin only.

post.description: Imports multiple users at once. Skips existing emails and collects per-row errors. Admin and superadmin only.

get.description: Returns full user details. Admins and superadmins can view any user; other users can only view their own profile.

put.description: Updates user fields. Admins/superadmins can update all fields including role. Users can only update their own display_name and username. Setting is_active to false invalidates all active sessions.

role.description: Admin only — replaces all current roles with this one

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user. Superadmin only. Cannot delete yourself or the last superadmin.

422.description: Cannot delete yourself or last superadmin

post.description: Restores a previously soft-deleted user. Superadmin only.

patch.description: Changes the password for a local-auth user. Users changing their own password must supply current_password. Admins/superadmins resetting another user's password do not need current_password. Invalidates all active Sanctum tokens after a successful change.

new_password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase and a number

422.description: Wrong current password or non-local provider

get.description: Returns the Azure AD OAuth2 authorization URL that the client should redirect to for authentication.
Handles the OAuth2 callback from Azure AD. Exchanges the authorization code for a user and returns a Sanctum token.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The authorization code received from Azure AD

post.description: Handles the OAuth2 callback from Azure AD via POST. Exchanges the authorization code for a user and returns a Sanctum token.

code.description: The authorization code received from Azure AD

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user with their roles.

post.description: Revokes the current user's authentication token.
Creates a new game session for a quiz. Generates a unique 8-digit game pin and a QR code for players to join. The authenticated user becomes the host.

quiz_id.description: The UUID of the quiz to create a game session for

message.example: The quiz id field is required.

items.example: The quiz id field is required.

title.example: What is the capital of France?
